# ollama_model_cli

使用<a href="https://docs.ollama.com/api/introduction">ollama</a>官方API接口写的一个命令行本地模型管理工具.主要用于熟悉<a href="https://docs.python.org/">Python</a>基础语法以及<a href="https://github.com/psf/requests">requests</a>库的使用.

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py
```

```shell
Larger language model ollama manager:

Usage:
    python3 ollama_model_cli.py [command]

Available Command:
    generate         Generate a response
    chat             Generate the next char message in a conversation between a user and an assistant
    embed            Creates vector embeddings representing the input text
    tags             Fetch a list of models and their details
    ps               Retrieve a list of models that are currently running
    show             Show more details
    create           Create a model
    copy             Copy a model
    pull             Pull a model
    push             Push a model
    delete           Delete a model
    version          Retrieve the version of the Ollama
```

## Usage

_Generate_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py generate qwen3:8b 今天天气怎么样
```

```shell
Model: qwen3:8b
Prompt: 今天天气怎么样
当然可以！请告诉我您所在的城市或地区，我帮您查询实时天气情况。
```

_Chat_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py chat gemma3 今天天气怎么样
```

```shell
Model: gemma3
Prompt: 今天天气怎么样
我现在无法获取实时的天气信息。不过，我可以告诉你如何查找今天的天气：

* **使用搜索引擎:** 在 Google、百度等搜索引擎中搜索“今天 天气 [你的城市名称]”
* **使用天气 App:**  例如墨迹天气、天气预报、彩云天气等。
* **访问天气网站:** 例如中国天气网 (http://www.weather.com.cn/)。

请告诉我你所在的城市，我可以帮你找到更准确的天气信息！
```

_Embed_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py embed embeddinggemma 今天天气怎么样
```


_Ps_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py ps
```

```shell
{
    "models": []
}
```

_Show model details_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py show qwen3:8b
```

_Create_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py create gemma3 alpaca You are Alpaca, a helpful AI assistant. You only answer with Emojis.
```

```shell
From: gemma3
Model: alpaca
System: you are alpaca, a helpful ai assistant. you only answer with emojis.
success
```

_Copy_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py copy gemma3 gemma3-backup-2
```

_Pull_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py pull embeddinggemma
```

_Push_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py push demo
```

_Delete_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py delete alpaca
```

_Get version_

```shell
> python3 ollama_model_cli.py version
```

```shell
0.21.0
```
